item.title: Merck Experimental HIV Prevention Pill
item.description:
• Summary: Merck is developing an experimental HIV prevention pill reportedly costing five dollars per year, aiming to expand access to pre-exposure prophylaxis (PrEP) in high-risk populations.
  • MoAs: Based on internal knowledge, potential mechanisms include inhibition of HIV reverse transcriptase or integrase, common in antiretroviral therapies, but specific MoA is undisclosed.
  • Sources: STAT News
